image.title: NAA Flores-Alanis, L Sandner-Miranda, G Delgado, A Cravioto, R Morales-Espinosa

item.title: The receptor binding domain of SARS-CoV-2 spike protein is the result of an ancestral recombination between the bat-CoV RaTG13 and the pangolin-CoV MP789.
